ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Dairy Technologists develop and implement processes to improve dairy production, quality, and safety.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: They work on the development of new dairy products, quality control, and ensuring compliance with regulations. They also conduct research and provide technical guidance to dairy farmers and industry professionals.
ncs_standard_definition.official_min_education: B.Tech in Dairy Technology or related field

first_stepper.description: Standard route for a high school student.
target_degrees: B.Tech in Dairy Technology or related field

choice_maker.description: Has a generic degree, needs a bridge.

future_builder.description: Already in the sector, looking to advance.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2 years of experience as a Dairy Technologist or related role
advanced_skills_to_learn: Data Analysis using R or Python

problem_solver_uturn.description: Switching from an unrelated field. No degree required.
portfolio_proof_required: Case study on dairy farm management

progression.senior_level: Senior Dairy Technologist or Dairy Scientist (5+ yrs)

roadmap.title: Core Competency
topics: Data Analysis using R or Python

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Case study on dairy farm management
